name: Contour 1
description: Voltage-controlled slew limiter and function generator with independently bendable rise and fall slopes. Generates AR/AD envelopes, LFO, VCO, or envelope follower. Slope times 500µs to 30s.

controls.name: Rise Slider
controls.description: Sets rising slew rate. Bottom = fast, top = slow.

controls.name: Fall Slider
controls.description: Sets falling slew rate. Bottom = fast, top = slow.

controls.name: Rise Bend Knob
controls.description: Shapes rising slope from concave through linear to convex.
controls.detail: CCW: concave · noon: linear · CW: convex

controls.name: Fall Bend Knob
controls.description: Shapes falling slope from concave through linear to convex.
controls.detail: CCW: concave · noon: linear · CW: convex

controls.name: Slew/Loop Switch
controls.description: Left: slew limiter / envelope. Right: loop mode (LFO/VCO).
controls.detail: Loop: output rises to +10V then falls to IN voltage, repeating

controls.name: Full/Audio Switch
controls.description: Sets frequency range. Full: LFO/envelope/slew. Audio: VCO/VCF range.

controls.name: Trigger Button
controls.description: Manually fires trigger: resets output to 0V then executes rise/fall.
controls.detail: Creates AD envelope in slew mode

controls.name: V/Oct Trimmer
controls.description: Front-panel trim pot for pitch tracking calibration in VCO mode.
controls.detail: Factory calibrated; adjust only when needed

inputs.name: IN
inputs.description: Analogue signal input for slew limiting. Sets minimum voltage in loop mode (0V default).

inputs.name: GATE
inputs.description: In slew mode: switches source to +10V for AR envelopes. In loop mode: gates oscillation.

inputs.name: TRIG.
inputs.description: Rising edge resets output to 0V and fires single-shot rise/fall (AD envelope).

inputs.name: HOLD
inputs.description: High gate slows the slew core to near-standstill, effectively freezing the output until released.

inputs.name: Rise Rate CV
inputs.description: Voltage control of rise rate. Normalizes to Fall Rate CV.

inputs.name: Rise Bend CV
inputs.description: Modulates rising slope shape. Normalizes to Fall Bend CV.

outputs.name: RISE
outputs.description: Gate output, high (+5V) while slew core is rising.

outputs.name: FALL
outputs.description: Gate output, high (+5V) while slew core is falling.

behaviors.name: AR Envelope
behaviors.description: High gate triggers rise to +10V; releasing gate triggers fall. Rise and fall times set by sliders.

behaviors.name: AD Envelope
behaviors.description: Rising edge resets to 0V then rises to +10V and falls. Manual button fires envelopes without patching.

behaviors.name: Slew Limiter / Portamento
behaviors.description: Smooths voltage changes at the IN input. Impedance-compensated output maintains pitch accuracy on 1V/oct sequences.

behaviors.name: LFO / VCO
behaviors.description: Continuously re-triggers, producing variable-shape waveform. Rise/fall sliders set frequency and shape. 1V/oct tracking in audio mode.

patchIdeas.name: Improved saw oscillator
patchIdeas.patch: Loop mode, audio range. Self-patch FALL gate to TRIG. so each cycle resets instantly to 0V for a clean saw edge.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Contour 1:
* Slew/Loop: Loop
* Full/Audio: Audio
* Rise: slow
* Fall: fast
- Contour 1 (FALL) t> Contour 1 (TRIG.) // self-reset for clean saw
- Contour 1 (OUT) -> VCF (In)
steps: Flip the Slew/Loop switch to Loop (right).
Flip the Full/Audio switch to Audio (right).
Push the Rise slider near the top (slow rising).
Push the Fall slider all the way to the bottom (fastest fall).
Centre both Bend knobs (linear slopes).
Patch Contour 1 FALL output into its own TRIG. input.
Patch Contour 1 OUT into a VCF input, then the VCF into your mixer.
Move the Rise slider to change pitch; the fall now snaps to 0V instantly.
patchIdeas.signalOut: OUT — audio-rate sawtooth, 0 to +10V, fundamental set by Rise slider.
patchIdeas.hear: A bright, buzzy sawtooth tone. Without the self-patch the waveform sounds duller; with FALL→TRIG. the reset edge sharpens it noticeably.

patchIdeas.name: AR envelope from a gate
patchIdeas.patch: Slew mode. Feed any gate into GATE; Contour 1 rises to +10V while high, falls back to IN voltage when released.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Contour 1:
* Slew/Loop: Slew
* Full/Audio: Full
- Sequencer (Gate) g> Contour 1 (GATE)
- Contour 1 (OUT) >> VCA (CV)
- VCO (Out) -> VCA (In)
steps: Flip the Slew/Loop switch to Slew (left).
Flip the Full/Audio switch to Full (left).
Set the Rise slider low-to-middle (short attack).
Set the Fall slider around the middle (medium release).
Centre both Bend knobs for linear slopes.
Patch a gate from a sequencer or keyboard into the GATE input.
Patch a VCO into a VCA input, and Contour 1 OUT into the VCA CV.
Play notes: the envelope opens the VCA while the gate is high.
patchIdeas.signalOut: OUT — unipolar 0 to +10V AR envelope synced to the incoming gate.
patchIdeas.hear: Classic attack-release shape under each note. Longer Fall slider gives lingering tails; a concave Fall bend makes the release feel more natural.

patchIdeas.name: AD envelope with trigger reset
patchIdeas.patch: Slew mode. A rising edge on TRIG. resets to 0V and fires a full rise→fall — great for drums and plucks.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Contour 1:
* Slew/Loop: Slew
- Sequencer (Trig) t> Contour 1 (TRIG.)
- Contour 1 (OUT) >> VCA (CV)
- VCO (Out) -> VCA (In)
steps: Flip the Slew/Loop switch to Slew (left).
Set Rise slider near the bottom for a fast attack.
Set Fall slider low-to-middle for a short decay.
Turn the Fall Bend knob slightly counter-clockwise (concave) for a natural decay.
Patch a trigger source into TRIG.
Patch Contour 1 OUT into a VCA CV input.
Tap the front-panel Trigger button to preview the envelope without patching.
patchIdeas.signalOut: OUT — one-shot AD envelope, 0 to +10V, fires on each trigger edge.
patchIdeas.hear: Snappy percussive envelope. Every trigger punches the output up to +10V and back down; Fall slider controls the decay length.

patchIdeas.name: Envelope follower
patchIdeas.patch: Slew mode, full range. Fast Rise tracks peaks, moderate Fall sets decay — extract a CV envelope from any audio.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Contour 1:
* Slew/Loop: Slew
* Full/Audio: Full
* Rise: fastest
* Fall: moderate
- Audio Source (Out) -> Contour 1 (IN)
- Contour 1 (OUT) >> VCF (Cutoff)
steps: Flip the Slew/Loop switch to Slew (left).
Flip the Full/Audio switch to Full (left).
Push the Rise slider all the way down (fastest attack).
Set the Fall slider around the middle for a musical decay.
Turn the Fall Bend knob counter-clockwise (concave) for a natural release.
Patch an audio source (drum loop, voice, guitar) into the IN jack.
Patch Contour 1 OUT into a VCF cutoff input as the follower CV.
Raise the Rise slider slightly if sharp transients cause clicks.
patchIdeas.signalOut: OUT — positive envelope CV tracking the amplitude of the IN signal.
patchIdeas.hear: The filter opens and closes with the dynamics of the source. Fast transients punch through; slower material produces smoother swells.

patchIdeas.name: Pulse width and delay from a trigger
patchIdeas.patch: Slew mode. A trigger produces two gates: RISE is wide during the rise time, FALL fires afterward — the rise time becomes the delay.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Contour 1:
* Slew/Loop: Slew
- Clock (Trig) t> Contour 1 (TRIG.)
- Contour 1 (RISE) g> VCA (Gate) // width gate
- Contour 1 (FALL) g> Drum (Trig) // delayed trigger
steps: Flip the Slew/Loop switch to Slew (left).
Set the Rise slider to control the gate width you want on RISE.
Set the Fall slider to control the gate width you want on FALL.
Patch a clock or trigger source into TRIG.
Patch RISE (+5V gate) into a VCA gate or drum trigger — this fires immediately.
Patch FALL (+5V gate) into a second trigger destination — this fires after the rise completes.
Adjust the Rise slider to change the delay between the two events.
patchIdeas.signalOut: RISE — +5V gate during rise stage · FALL — +5V gate during fall, delayed by the rise time.
patchIdeas.hear: Two rhythmic hits per incoming trigger, spaced by the Rise setting. Great for creating flams, echo-like doubles, or timed gate windows.

patchIdeas.name: FM/AM VCO with audio IN
patchIdeas.patch: Loop mode, audio range. Feed an external oscillator into IN; Contour 1 oscillates on top of it, combining FM and AM.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Contour 1:
* Slew/Loop: Loop
* Full/Audio: Audio
- Modulator VCO (Out) -> Contour 1 (IN)
- Pitch CV (1V/oct) >> Contour 1 (Rise Rate CV) // normalled to Fall
- Contour 1 (OUT) -> Mixer (In)
steps: Flip the Slew/Loop switch to Loop (right).
Flip the Full/Audio switch to Audio (right).
Set Rise and Fall sliders to roughly equal positions for a symmetric waveform.
Centre both Bend knobs (required for clean 1V/oct tracking).
Patch a 1V/oct pitch CV into Rise Rate CV (it normals to Fall Rate CV for tracking).
Patch a second oscillator's output into the IN jack — start with a low amplitude.
Patch Contour 1 OUT into a mixer or VCF.
Raise the modulator amplitude to deepen the FM/AM effect; try bend CV for extra motion.
patchIdeas.signalOut: OUT — audio oscillator whose lower bound is modulated by the IN signal, producing combined frequency and amplitude modulation.
patchIdeas.hear: A complex, metallic timbre that morphs as you change the modulator's pitch and level. Small amounts sound like vibrato + tremolo; large amounts get aggressive and FM-like.
